nasb.text: Now while I was speaking and praying, and confessing my sin and the sin of my people Israel, and presenting my supplication before the Lord my God in behalf of the holy mountain of my God,

esv.text: While I was speaking and praying, confessing my sin and the sin of my people Israel, and presenting my plea before the Lord my God for the holy hill of my God,

cnv.text: 我還在說話、禱告、承認我的罪和我同胞以色列人的罪，為我　神的聖山，向耶和華我的　神懇求的時候；

ccb.text: 我继续祷告，承认我和同胞以色列人的罪，为我上帝耶和华的圣山在祂面前祈求。
